title: Emblem Tactics
summary: Fire emblem-inspired TRPG with roguelike elements. Each playthrough features procedurally generated maps.

title: Group Text Adventure
summary: A collaborative text-based adventure game where you and your friends can solve puzzles and progress through the story together.

title: Titan Mining Simulator
summary: A mining simulation game where you can explore and extract resources from Saturn's moon Titan.

title: Applesoft Basic Interpreter
summary: Relive printing your name on the screen with an interpreter for the Applesoft BASIC programming language, allowing you to run simple text-based BASIC programs.
